wiki.extract: Chrysler Europe was the American automotive company Chrysler's operations in Europe from 1967 through 1978. It was formed from the merger of the French Simca, British Rootes and Spanish Barreiros companies. In 1978, Chrysler sold the division to PSA Peugeot Citroën.

sampleRecords.employer: Matt Bowers Chrysler Dodge Jeep Ram Service
sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by discharged object or substance
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was completing a vehicle inspection when they grabbed a hydraulic line and pressurized oil from the hose was injected into their right thumb. The employee was hospitalized and required surgery.

sampleRecords.employer: Houston Mac Haik Dodge Chrysler Jeep LTD
sampleRecords.nature: Multiple severe wounds and internal injuries
sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by forward-moving vehicle in nonroadway area
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was guiding a co-worker as they drove a vehicle onto a four post lift. The co-worker attempted to brake but hit the gas pedal instead, causing the vehicle to accelerate and pin the employee to a toolbox. The employee suffered injuries including a spinal fracture, cracked ribs, a lacerated spleen and a hematoma on right side of body that required hospitalization.

sampleRecords.employer: Taylor Belleville Chrysler Dodge Jeep Ram
sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in running equipment or machinery during regular operation
sampleRecords.final_narrative: A service technician was operating the tire changing machine when the machine came down and crushed his left index finger on the rim. The finger was amputated at the first knuckle.

sampleRecords.employer: Musson Patout Chrysler Dodge Jeep Ram
sampleRecords.part_of_body: Chest, except internal location of diseases or disorders
sampleRecords.nature: Third or fourth degree heat (thermal) burns
sampleRecords.event_description: Ignition of vapors, gases, or liquids
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was using denatured alcohol to remove glue from a vehicle. The employee lit a small amount of the alcohol on fire, which ignited the vapor from the alcohol bottle and caused the bottle to explode. The employee sustained second and third degree burns on his upper left torso.

sampleRecords.employer: Auto Nation Chrysler Dodge Jeep RAM Spring
sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in running equipment or machinery during regular operation
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was using a tire balancing machine. A spinning tire on the machine broke the employee's right leg.
